title: Reseda Theatre
description: The opening shot of Boogie Nights was filmed at the Reseda Theatre.

title: Hot Traxx Disco
description: After the film's title appears on the facade of the Reseda Theatre, the camera floats over to Hot Traxx Disco, a fictional nightclub. This location is now home to Iglesia de Restauración, a Mexican church.

title: Du-par's Restaurant
description: Eddie has dinner with Jack Horner and Amber Waves at Du-par's Restaurant. This location is currently a Sephora.

title: Eddie's Parents' Gouse
description: At the beginning of the film, Eddie lives in Torrance, Los Angeles.

title: Jack's House
description: The filming location for Jack Horner's house can be found in the city of Covina.

title: Saint Catherine of Siena Catholic Church
description: Saint Catherine of Siena Catholic Church can be seen in the background as Dirk is picked up by a man.

title: El Royale Hotel
description: Todd schemes with Dirk at the the El Royale Hotel in Studio City.

title: Rahad Jackson's House
description: Todd attempts to rob Rahad Jackson's house. The house is located in Encino.

title: Buck's Super Cool Stereo Store
description: The stereo store where Buck works and later buys to establish Buck's Super Cool Stereo Store is located in Arleta.

title: Pussycat Theatre
description: The Pussycat Theatre was located at 1442 2nd St. in Santa Monica.

title: Dirk's House
description: The house Dirk purchases after finding success in the porn industry is located in the Woodland Hills neighborhood.

title: Bridge in Dirk Diggler Documentary
description: The bridge seen in the documentary Amber films about Dirk can be found at this location.

title: Miss Donuts
description: Buck witnesses an attempted robbery at this donut shop, and Rollergirl beats up a former classsmate across the street from this location.

title: Jimmy's House
description: Sydney confronts Jimmy at his house.

title: Ace Motor Lodge
description: Sydney finds John and Clementine holed up in the Ace Motor Lodge in Reno with a man they have beaten up.

title: Jack's Cafe
description: Sydney meets John outside Jack's Cafe in Sparks, Nevada.

title: The Golden Fang
description: Doc tracks down the Golden Fang in his search for Shasta. The boat is actually the Tallship American Pride, which can be found at dock 3 in Rainbow Harbor in Long Beach.

title: The Chowder Barge
description: Doc has lunch with Sauncho at The Chowder Barge.

title: Walker's Cafe
description: Doc and Denis have coffee at Walker's Cafe (now closed).

title: Doc's House (exterior)
description: Doc lives near the coast on Manhattan Beach (Gordita Beach in Inherent Vice).

title: DA's Office
description: Doc visits Penny at the DA's office.

title: Parker Center (exterior)
description: Doc visits the Parker Center to talk to Bigfoot. The Parker Center is the former headquarters of the Los Angeles Police Department (1955–2009).

title: Parker Center (interior)
description: Interior shots of the Parker Center were actually filmed at this location.

title: Wolfman's House
description: Mickey Wolfman lives in Beverly Hills.

title: Rainy Flashback Street
description: The rainy flashback in Inherent Vice was filmed in Pomona, CA.

title: Doc on Street
description: Doc is seen briefly wandering the street in Compton, CA.

title: Housing Development
description: The housing development (now fully realized) can be found in Lancaster, CA.

title: Doc's House (interior)
description: This location was used for interior shots of Doc's house.

title: Gary's School
description: Scenes at Gary's school were filmed at Gaspar de Portola Charter Middle School.

title: Tail O' the Cock
description: PTA and crew converted Billingsley Restaurant into the Tail O' the Cock restaraunt and golf course in Van Nuys for Licorice Pizza.

title: Encino 76 Gas Station
description: Gary and his crew stop at this gas station.

title: Election Office
description: The Sofa Place Furniture was used to film scenes as Joel Wachs's election office.

title: Fat Bernie's Pinball Arcade
description: Fat Bernie's, Gary's waterbed store and, later, arcade, is located in Chatsworth.

title: El Portal Theater
description: Gary and Alana reconnect outside the El Portal Theater in North Hollywood.

title: Mikado Hotel
description: Gary has lunch with Jerry Frick at his restaraunt.

title: Waterbed Store
description: Scenes involving Gary's waterbed store were filmed along Devonshire Street in Chatsworth,  the West End Arts District.

title: Waterbed Store
description: Scenes involving Gary's waterbed store were filmed along Devonshire Street in Chatsworth,  the West End Arts District.

title: Hot Dog Stand
description: The hot dog stand in Licorice Pizza is now Cupid's Hot Dogs.

title: Gary's House
description: Gary's house can be found in North Hollywood.

title: Alana's House
description: Alana's house can be found in North Hollywood.

title: Wig Shop
description: Mr. Jack sells wigs and waterbeds at this location.

title: Teen-Age Fair
description: Scenes at the Teen-Age Fair where shot at the Hollywood Palladium, where the event actually took place.

title: Police Station
description: Garry is arrested and briefly taken to this police station.

title: Running after Police Station
description: Gary and Alana run from the police station along this street.

title: Running after Police Station
description: Gary and Alana run from the police station along this street.

title: Truck Loading
description: Gary and Alana load a truck at this location for their waterbed business. This location is also seen on the film's poster.

title: Baseball Field Dugout
description: Alana talks to her sister Danielle at the Van Nuys/Sherman Oaks Recreation Center.

title: Alana's Audition
description: Alana auditions for Jack Holden. This scene was filmed at the Church of the Chimes in Sherman Oaks.

title: Victory Blvd & Lindley Ave
description: Gary passes by a long line of cars during the oil crisis.

title: Signal Gasoline
description: Gary runs to this gas station. In reality, it is currently John's Automotive.

title: Jon Peters's House
description: Jon Peters lives at this location.

title: Winding Road near Jon Peters's House
description: The winding road through which Alana has to maneuver the moving truck is Palo Drive.

title: Intersection
description: Alana projects that she and Gary can make it to a gas station if she can reach this intersection in the moving truck.

title: Encino Post Office
description: After their escape from Jon Peters, Alana sits in front of the Encino Post Office. In reality, this location is  FedEx location.

title: Bryson Apartments
description: One of the scenes in Magnolia's prologues takes place at the Bryson Apartment Hotel.

title: Foxfire Room
description: Quiz Kid Donnie drinks his sorrows away at the Foxfire Room.

title: Magnolia Boulevard
description: Magnolia derives its title from this street in the San Fernando Valley.

title: Jim's Drive
description: Jim drives along Reseda Boulevard in the rain.

title: Solomon & Solomon
description: Solomon's store was the home of LA Popular Furniture until 2025.

title: Apartment Building
description: Jim visits this apartment building on his patrol. When he hears gunfire, he slips and loses his own gun.

title: Pharmacy
description: Linda picks up prescriptions at this pharmacy, which is actually A to Z Pharmacy in North Hollywood.

title: Hotel in Valencia
description: Frank delivers his "Seduce and Destroy" seminar at this hotel in Valencia.

title: Apartment in North Hills
description: Jim visits this apartment building on his patrol.

title: Prologue Rooftop
description: The rooftop seen in Magnolia's prologue can be found in Hollywood.

title: Big Bear Lake
description: In the prologue, a scubadiver is lifted out of the water by a firefighting plane. These scenes take place at Big Bear Lake.

title: Liquor Store
description: Donnie crashes his car into a liquor store. In reality, it is Liquor Stop N Go Supermarket in Winnetka.

title: Howard Sommerville's House
description: Howard Sommerville lives at this house, where he runs his refugee operation and from which he is kidnapped by Avanti.

title: The Sisters of the Brave Beaver Compound
location: La Purísima Mission State Historic Park
description: Bob heads to the convent of the Sisters of the Brave Beaver to try to find Willa. Lockjaw and his men, however, capture her there. These scenes were filmed at La Purísima Mission State Historical Park.

title: Murphy's Market
description: On a payphone outside of Murphy's Market, Bob desperately tries to secure a meeting location from the resistance, but he can't remember the series of code words needed to prove his allegiance.

title: Welcome to Anza-Borrego Desert State Park Sign
description: The film's climactic car chase through the rolling hills of the Anza-Borrego Desert ends atop the "Texas Dip." Willa slams on her breaks just out of view of Tim, a member of the Christmas Adventurer's Club, who is pursuing her. Fleeing the parked car to take cover with a gun next to the state park sign, Willa watches on in defense as Tim barrels up the hill and smashes into the car.

title: Eureka High School
description: Willa attends her high school dance with some friends. While in the bathroom, Deandra approaches Willa and urges her to escape because troops are on their way to the school to find and capture her. The two barely escape the building before Lockjaw and his men descend.

title: Sensei's Apartment
description: Sensei's wife works on the first floor of this building at the Genesis Perfumeria, located in El Paso in real life. Above the perfumeria is an extensive network of apartments the couple uses to hide migrants.

title: Sacramento County Courthouse
description: Pat and Perfidia walk into the County Courthouse to plant a second bomb. While inside the building, Lockjaw catches Perfidia setting up the device in a bathroom stall and coerces her to sleep with him.

title: County Administration Building
description: Mae West plants a bomb in the County Administration Building. Pat and Perfidia are also planting a bomb in a separate building. In the film, Pat says they are three blocks away from each other, when in reality they are right across the street.

title: Parking Lot
description: Lockjaw spies on Perfidia through his binoculars as she ties up two security guards in a parking lot.

title: Westward Bank Explosion
description: The French 75 cause an explosion at "Westward Bank" in a brief clip during a montage of the group's aggressive revolutionary tactics. The explosion was created through practical effects due to the building's uninhabited status. Behind the bank is Improv Alley, which was featured during the chase sequence through Downtown Sacramento.

title: Kimpton Sawyer Hotel
description: Exterior shots for Lockjaw's meeting with representatives from the Christmas Adventurers Club were filmed at the Kimpton Sawyer Hotel.

title: Via de la Amistad
description: The opening shot of One Battle After Another features Perfidia walking across an overpass looking down at Otay Mesa Detention Center. The real Otay Mesa sits under three miles away.

title: Parking Garage
description: After their van crashes while fleeing police officers, several members of the French 75 take off on foot. In an attempt to dodge several cop cars, Perfidia runs down an alley and into a parking garage. This chase is filmed from an overhead shot on Jazz Alley.

title: Tower Bridge
description: A car carrying Deandra and several other members of the French 75 is seen driving across Tower Bridge, leaving Sacramento, as a squad of police cars drive in the opposite direction into the city.

title: Christmas Adventurer's Club HQ
description: The Christmas Adventurers Club meets in an underground HQ at this house in Sacramento.

title: Eckhart Auto Body
description: Barry's toilet-plunger business is actually located at Eckhart Auto Body.

title: Mattress Man's Store
description: The Mattress Man's store is now currently Just 99¢ & Deals in Pomona, CA.

title: Le Petit Chateau
description: The restaurant where Barry takes Lena on a date and beats up the bathroom Le Petit Chateau, now permanently closed.

title: Royal Hawaiian Hotel
description: Barry travels to Hawaii and meets up Lena at the Royal Hawaiian Hotel.

title: Phone Booth
description: Barry calls Lena from a phone booth after he arrives in Hawaii.

title: Foster's Freeze
description: While being chashed by the Matress Man's henchmen, Barry runs by this Foster's Freeze.

title: Sanwa Bank ATM
description: The Mattress Man's henchmen threaten Barry and force him to retrieve money from this Sanwa Bank ATM.

title: Barry's Apartment
description: Barry lives in this apartment complex in Sherman Oaks.

title: USS Hornet — Sea, Air and Space Museum
description: This is the Navy vessel Freddie works on in the opening scene of The Master.

title: USS Potomac
description: Freddie sneaks onto Lancaster Dodd's ship while docked in San Francisco.

title: Hillside Elementary School
description: The interior shot of Lancaster Dodd's London school at the end of The Master was filmed here. Freddie speaks to Dodd, who is sitting at a wooden desk in front of large floor-to-ceiling windows.

title: Doris's House
description: Freddie visits Doris at her house in Crockett, CA.

title: Alden Park
description: Freddie and Doris sit and talk on this park bench.

title: Admiral's Mansion
description: Lancaster Dodd's house can be a bit tricky to find, which we'll attempt to better pinpoint.  The house is known as the Captain's Mansion, a former event space on Mare Island in Vallejo, California.  The first challenge is that many houses spanning several blocks on this street look almost identical and are used for similar purposes.  There are subtle differences from house to house, however, be it minor architectural variations, trees and shrubs, views in the background, etc., which do allow for identifying the exact home from the film, To get exactly to The Master house, make sure you arrive at the intersection of Walnut Ave and 8th St on Mare Island and you'll successfully find house, which has the number 822 on the front steps.

title: Daniel's Mansion
description: Daniel's house can be found at the Greystone Mansion & Gardens. It originally belonged to Edward Doheny.

title: House of Woodcock
description: Reynolds lives and work in this Fitzroy Square house, which was adapted for filming.

title: Unnamed London Restaurant
description: This restaurant, which Reynolds frequents, was the original location of Wild Honey in London.

title: Hotel Victoria
location: Station Rd, Robin Hood's Bay, Whitby YO22 4RL
description: Reynolds and Alma meet at this seaside cafe.

title: High Street
description: Reynolds speeds down this road on the way to his country home. Lythe Community Shop and Post Office can be seen in the shot.

title: House of Woodcock (rear entrance)
description: The staff of the House of Woodcock enter through the house's rear entrance on this street.

title: Owlpen Manor
location: Owlpen Manor, Uley, Dursley GL11 5BZ, United Kingdom
description: Owlpen Manor was the filming location for the Woodcocks' country home.

title: Kelmscott Manor
description: Kelmscott Manor served as a major influence for the set of the Woodcocks' country home.

title: High Street
description: Reynolds and Alma walk down this street on their way to dinner.

title: Costume Atelier
location: Charing Cross Rd, London WC2H, United Kingdom
description: This location served as the makeshift workshop for costume designer Mark Bridges. Coincidentally, it is also the former address of the Central St. Martins College of Art and Design.

title: Grandhotel Giessbach
description: Reynolds and Alma eat breakfast on the balcony of their room at Grandhotel Giessbach.

title: Hotel Bellevue des Alpes
description: Reynolds sits and reads in front of this hotel as Alma climbs a mountain with other guests.

title: Devonshire Hall
location: Tower Entrance, Promenade, Blackpool FY1 4BJ, United Kingdom
description: Blackpool Tower Ballroom serves as the filming location for Devonshire Hall, where Alma attends a New Year's Eve party.
